data.title: Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Bank Of Montreal Cut Positions In Marvell Technology — Invesco, T. Rowe Price Doubled Down
How Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's Clever Pick-Up Line Turned A Homework Proposal Into Marriage While Building $3.38 Trillion AI Chip Giant Along The Way
data.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang shared how a college pick-up line led to his marriage and his eventual rise to helm a $3.38 trillion AI chip giant.

data.title: This Analyst With 86% Accuracy Rate Sees More Than 12% Upside In Starbucks - Here Are 5 Stock Picks For Last Week From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Tesla Rival BYD Marks 68% Growth In November Sales Driven By Popularity Of Plug-In Hybrid EVs
data.description: Chinese EV giant BYD said on Sunday that the company sold 506,804 new energy passenger vehicles in November, marking a jump of nearly 68% from last year, thanks to a major jump in plug-in hybrid passenger vehicle sales.

data.title: Economist Warns Trump That BRICS Will 'Act Collectively' And Spark A Trade War With US Over 100% Tariff Threats
data.description: President-elect Donald Trump's threat to impose 100% tariffs on BRICS nations if they create an alternative to the U.S. dollar has drawn mixed reactions from leading economists, highlighting tensions over global trade and currency dominance.
